message:
fix(mux): restore inspector UI and fix binary protocol

- Restore original inspector UI with left/right panels, tabs, resize
- Fix binary inspector_subscribe to send proper 6-byte message
- Server sends initial inspector_state after subscribe
- Fix upload/download dialogs (focus input, enter/esc handlers)
- Remove debug timing spam from backend

files.patch:
@@ -29,10 +29,10 @@ export const BinaryCtrlMsg = {
   RESIZE_PANEL: 0x82,
   FOCUS_PANEL: 0x83,
   SPLIT_PANEL: 0x84,
-  CLOSE_TAB: 0x85,
-  SWITCH_TAB: 0x86,
-  NEW_TAB: 0x87,
-  RENAME_TAB: 0x88,
+  INSPECTOR_SUBSCRIBE: 0x85,
+  INSPECTOR_UNSUBSCRIBE: 0x86,
+  INSPECTOR_TAB: 0x87,
+  VIEW_ACTION: 0x88,
   // Auth messages
   GET_AUTH_STATE: 0x90,
   SET_PASSWORD: 0x91,
